codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original reader implementation commit and the follow-up hardening commit for MR version selection. The prior blocking issue is fixed: `GetMergeRequestVersions` now scans all returned versions, chooses the newest deterministically by `created_at` with GitLab version ID tie-breaking, and regression tests cover both newest-first and out-of-order API responses. I did not identify remaining blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed GitLab reader feature area from the inspected code and diffs.

summary: Reviewed prior failure evidence, both relevant handoffs/transcript skeletons, and the original plus hardening diffs for `pipeline-gitlab-readers`. The previous blocking bug around choosing `versions[0]` is resolved by deterministic newest-version selection in `internal/gitlab/client.go` and by regression coverage in `internal/gitlab/client_test.go` for out-of-order version responses, so this feature now passes scrutiny.
